Core Facilities

Advanced Treatments
Tailored for You

From medical dermatology to cosmetic enhancement — every treatment at SSKIN CITY uses the latest technology with a gentle, personalised approach.

Injectables

Botox & Filler

Smooth dynamic wrinkles and restore volume with precision-placed injections of botulinum toxin and hyaluronic acid fillers for a naturally youthful appearance.

WrinklesScars on FaceVolume Restoration
Learn More →
Injectables

PRP – Platelet Rich Plasma

Harness the regenerative power of your own blood platelets to stimulate collagen, improve skin tone, and deliver a luminous facial glow naturally.

Facial GlowHair GrowthCollagen Boost
Learn More →
Injectables

Plasma Rich Protein (PRP)

Advanced plasma therapy targeting facial rejuvenation, scar reduction, and stimulation of natural hair regrowth through concentrated growth factors.

Facial RejuvenationScar TreatmentHair Growth
Learn More →
Laser Treatments

CO₂ Laser

State-of-the-art fractional CO₂ laser for comprehensive skin resurfacing, precise scar revision, and professional tattoo removal with minimal downtime.

ResurfacingLaser SurgeryTattoo Removal
Learn More →
Laser Treatments

Q-Switch Nd:YAG Laser

US FDA-approved gold-standard laser for pigmented lesion correction and tattoo removal — safe for all skin types including darker Indian skin tones.

Pigmented LesionsTattoo RemovalFDA Approved
Learn More →
Laser Treatments

Diode Laser / Hormany XL

Advanced diode laser system delivering long-lasting hair reduction with superior efficacy across all skin types for silky, smooth skin results.

Hair ReductionAll Skin TypesLong-lasting
Learn More →
Skin Rejuvenation

Hydrafacial

Multi-step medical-grade facial treatment combining deep cleansing, exfoliation, extraction, and hydration for instantly refreshed, glowing skin.

Deep HydrationGlowFacial Rejuvenation
Learn More →
Skin Rejuvenation

Chemical Peeling

Medically formulated chemical exfoliation to visibly reduce acne scars, pigmentation, and uneven tone — revealing smoother, more radiant skin underneath.

Scar MarksPigmentationFacial Rejuvenation
Learn More →
Skin Rejuvenation

Microdermabrasion

Non-invasive crystal-tip exfoliation technique to deeply polish skin, reduce acne scarring, and restore a refined, healthy skin texture.

Skin PolishingAcne ScarTexture Refinement
Learn More →
Scar & Pigmentation

Fractional Laser

Precision fractional resurfacing technology targeting stubborn scars and deep pigmentation with minimal disruption to surrounding healthy skin tissue.

Scar ReductionPigmentationSkin Texture
Learn More →
Scar & Pigmentation

Microneedling

Collagen induction therapy using fine micro-needles to naturally stimulate skin healing, dramatically improving acne scars and skin quality.

Acne ScarCollagen BoostSkin Healing
Learn More →
Scar & Pigmentation

Vitiligo Surgery

Specialised punch grafting procedure to restore natural skin colour in vitiligo-affected areas — offering renewed confidence with lasting cosmetic results.

VitiligoPunch GraftingRepigmentation
Learn More →
Hair Treatments

Microblading

Semi-permanent eyebrow artistry technique using fine hair strokes to recreate natural, fuller-looking brows — perfect for sparse or over-plucked eyebrows.

EyebrowSemi-permanentHair Strokes
Learn More →
Hair Treatments

RF Surgery & Electrocautry

Minimally invasive radiofrequency-based procedure for the precise, safe removal of moles, warts, and unwanted skin tags with no scarring.

MolesWartsSkin Tags
Learn More →
Phototherapy

PUVA & UVB Light Chamber

Advanced phototherapy chamber delivering targeted ultraviolet treatment for chronic skin conditions including psoriasis, vitiligo, and related disorders.

PsoriasisVitiligoPhototherapy
Learn More →
Dermatology

All Dermato Cosmetic

Comprehensive dermatology services covering a full spectrum of skin conditions, cosmetic concerns, and confidential management of sex-related skin diseases.

Full SpectrumSTDCosmetic
Learn More →
Wellness

Iontophoresis

Clinically proven treatment using low-level electrical current to significantly reduce excessive sweating of the palms and soles — safe and highly effective.

SweatingPalmsSoles

Meet the Expert

Dr P K Bhoopallka

M.D. (Skin & V.D.) · Dermatologist & Cosmetic Laser Surgeon

With over 15 years of specialised practice in dermatology and cosmetic laser surgery, Dr P K Bhoopallka has established SSKIN CITY as the premier skin care destination in Siliguri and the North Bengal region.

His philosophy centres on combining evidence-based dermatological medicine with the most advanced aesthetic technologies — ensuring every patient receives outcomes that are both medically sound and aesthetically refined. As a त्वचा, सौन्दर्य एवं गुप्त रोग विशेषज्ञ, he provides compassionate, discreet care across the full spectrum of dermatological needs.

Weekly Update

This Week's Newsletter

Stay updated with the latest from Dr Bhoopallka's desk — treatment news, seasonal skin tips, and clinic announcements.

SSKIN CITY Monthly Digest

From the desk of Dr P K Bhoopallka, Dermatologist & Cosmetic Laser Surgeon

📬 March 2025 · Issue #03
🌟 This Month's Highlight

We are thrilled to announce that SSKIN CITY now offers the first-time USFDA approved laser treatments in the region. These cutting-edge systems represent the gold standard in cosmetic laser therapy, delivering superior results with greater safety for all skin types, including Indian skin tones.

"As dermatologists, our commitment is not just to treat skin — it is to understand it, respect it, and help it thrive. These new laser systems allow us to do exactly that with greater precision than ever before." — Dr P K Bhoopallka
🌸 Seasonal Skin Tips — Summer Prep

As temperatures rise, your skin's needs change. Here are Dr Bhoopallka's top recommendations for keeping skin healthy and radiant this summer:

☀️
SPF 50+ Daily
Apply broad-spectrum sunscreen every 2–3 hours, even indoors near windows.
💧
Deep Hydration
Switch to a lightweight hyaluronic acid serum to maintain moisture without clogging pores.
🧴
Gentle Cleansing
Cleanse twice daily with a mild, pH-balanced cleanser to control excess sebum production.
🏥 Clinic News

Our clinic hours remain Monday to Saturday, 10:00 AM to 8:00 PM. We recommend booking appointments in advance as slots fill quickly. The clinic is conveniently located on the 2nd Floor, Rajani Tower, beside Meghdoot Cinema, Hill Cart Road, Siliguri.

For existing patients: please bring your previous treatment records on your next visit. For new patients, a full skin consultation is included with your first appointment at no extra charge.

📍 Siliguri, West Bengal  ·  📞 +91 74014 56456  ·  Published weekly by SSKIN CITY
